The fires increase in intensity over time, causing {COM_3_VAL0_CORPOREALDAMAGE} during the first {COM_2_DURA_SECONDS}, {COM_5_VAL0_CORPOREALDAMAGE} for the next {COM_4_DURA_SECONDS}, and {COM_7_VAL0_CORPOREALDAMAGE} for the final {COM_6_DURA_SECONDS}.
If there are multiple Napalm Grenades in the same area only the highest level one will deal damage.

Evidence.TextExcerpt: You deploy a shock rod at your feet which will remain for up to {COM_4_DURA_SECONDS} and periodically blast out with waves of power, dealing {COM_2_VAL0_COM_0_VAL0_CORPOREALDAMAGE} every {COM_0_FREQ_SECONDS} to all enemies within {COM_2_RADI_FEET} of it.

Evidence.Meaning: Read component slot 2 (component id 1697), then read the selected component's Interval field and format it as seconds
Evidence.TextExcerpt: You carefully unpack a mini-keg of rare and precious Bugman's Finest Stout with reverential awe. For the next {COM_0_DURA_SECONDS}, the faint vapors escaping from the keg will rejuvenate any allies within {COM_3_RADI_FEET} of it, restoring {COM_3_VAL0_COM_0_VAL0_HEALTH} every {COM_2_FREQ_SECONDS}. You dream of the day that the brew will be aged enough to actually tap and drink.
